transport: HTTP x402 — PAID ALIAS of /x402/get_trade_signal. get_trade_call is the promoted canonical tool name; this route delegates to the get_trade_signal pricing/handler/binding/idempotency (same single-source core fn). Response shape is BYTE-IDENTICAL to get_trade_signal (drift-protected by the shared handler).
discovery_type: NONE — non-discoverable (send402 discoverable:false → NO extensions.bazaar). Deliberately kept OUT of HTTP_TOOLS and OUT of the CDP Bazaar catalog (A2 2026-05-29); the canonical get_trade_signal route carries the single Bazaar listing. isPricedTool + the MCP free-tier path are byte-unchanged (the alias is HTTP-only).

error_contract.402: Payment-Required envelope { x402Version, error, resource{url=/x402/get_trade_call,description,mimeType}, accepts[] (get_trade_signal requirements) } — NO extensions.bazaar (non-discoverable), NO live tool result

cache_contract: no cache — live per-request via the shared core fn (HOLDs free; async settle post-response)
paywall: x402 only (license.tier===x402); unpaid → 402; binds via paymentMatchesToolRoute(get_trade_signal) which is resource-URL-agnostic (asset/network/payTo + price floor)
consumers: public docs (algovault.com/docs.html#x402 quickstart promotes this canonical-name route)
autonomous x402 agents calling the canonical get_trade_call name
leak_guard: tests/x402-http-routes.test.ts (alias GET → 402 with own resource URL + USD Coin requirement + NO bazaar extension) + tests/x402-paid-path.test.ts (unpaid POST → 402, no top-level call/confidence leak; still NOT in HTTP_TOOLS)
